user.title: Uninus Calendar Service Scheduler
user.description: Create calendar events that run Home Assistant services when they start.

data.allowed_services: Allowed services, one per line. Supports domain.* wildcards.

init.title: Uninus Calendar Service Scheduler options
init.description: Save general settings normally. To clear traceability data, type the exact confirmation text and check the irreversible confirmation below. This only deletes traceability data stored by this integration and Calendar events marked as traceability records. Ordinary Calendar events are not deleted.

data.allowed_services: Allowed services, one per line. Supports domain.* wildcards.
data.clear_traceability_text: To clear traceability data, type: 清空履歷資料
data.confirm_clear_traceability_data: I understand this cannot be undone; clear all traceability data

error.confirmation_required: Select the confirmation checkbox to continue.
error.confirmation_text_required: Type the exact confirmation text: 清空履歷資料
error.clear_failed: Could not clear traceability data. The reset was not completed; check Home Assistant logs and retry.
